channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Giants bench QB Daniel Jones and will start Tommy DeVito vs. the Bucs, AP source says
item.description: The New York Giants are benching struggling quarterback Daniel Jones and will start fan favorite Tommy DeVito against the Tampa Bay Buccaneers this week in an attempt to break a five-game losing streak, according to a person with knowledge of the decision.
item.dc:creator: Tom Canavan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 49ers report card: Playoff hopes dim as team looks mentally, physically ragged
item.description: Falling apart in the fourth quarter is the legacy the 49ers (5-5) are solidifying under coach Kyle Shanahan, be it in the playoffs or now against regular-season NFC West foes.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: New Detroit Lions acquisition channels Pistons’ championship spirit in stellar debut
item.description: New Detroit Lions acquisition Za’Darius Smith channeled former Detroit Pistons star Rasheed Wallace in his stellar debut as he brought the same championship spirit the city felt 20 years ago.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Trump support dominates weekend in sports as athletes perform president-elect's dance moves
item.description: Support for President-elect Donald Trump was on full display across the entire weekend as athletes performed his dance moves during matches and games.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Backup QB Arbuckle leads Toronto past Winnipeg 41-24 for the Argonauts' 19th Grey Cup title
item.description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia (AP) — Backup quarterback Nick Arbuckle led the Toronto Argonauts to their record-extending 19th Grey Cup title, throwing two second-half touchdown passes in a 41-24 victory over the Winnipeg Blue Bombers on Sunday night at B.C. Place.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: James Harden breaks tie with Ray Allen, moves to No. 2 on NBA's career 3-point list
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — James Harden now stands alone at No. 2 in 3-pointers. The Los Angeles Clippers guard connected on the 2,974th 3-pointer of his career Sunday night and broke a tie with Basketball Hall of Famer Ray Allen for the No. 2 spot on the NBA’s list.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Cavaliers to put perfect start on line against champion Celtics in juicy matchup, playoff rematch
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — The Cavaliers will put their perfect start on the line in the perfect place. “Boston Garden,” said Cleveland first-year coach Kenny Atkinson, who has yet to lose in his new job. “What's better than that?” As NBA games in November go, not much.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cunningham's 4th triple-double of the season lifts the Pistons to a 124-104 rout of Washington
item.description: Cade Cunningham had 21 points, 10 assists and 10 rebounds to lead the Detroit Pistons over the Washington Wizards 124-104.
item.dc:creator: Noah Trister, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Triathlete with terminal cancer completes Ironman championship
item.description: An Ironman is a test of endurance featuring a 2.4-mile swim, a 26.2-mile marathon run, and a 112-mile bike ride.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Photos: San Francisco 49ers collapse in fourth quarter and lose to Seattle Seahawks
item.description: The Seattle Seahawks defeated the San Francisco 49ers 20-17 with a 13-yard rush into the end zone by quarterback Geno Smith.
item.dc:creator: Jane Tyska, Jose Carlos Fajardo, Nhat V. Meyer, Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Rays will have to weather the storm next season at Steinbrenner Field
item.description: As the Tampa Bay Rays begin to gather information for their 2025 season at Steinbrenner Field in Tampa, the most unpredictable and challenging element will most likely be weather.
item.dc:creator: Daniel Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah State crushes Hawaii, 55-10
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Rahsul Faison rushed for 192 yards and two touchdowns, as the Utah State football team cruised past Hawaii Saturday at Maverik Stadium, 55-10.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes get run over by #17 Colorado, 49-24
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes losing streak continues, with no end in sight. Shedeur Sanders overcame a shaky start to throw three touchdown passes, LaJohntay Wester returned a punt 76 yards for a score and No. 18 Colorado pulled away late to beat Utah 49-24 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Roy High to play for first state title since 1981
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Roy High football team will play for its first state championship in 43 years. Roy defeated defending 5A champion Timpview on Friday, 29-19 to advance to next week's title game at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Andrei Vasilevskiy approaching 300th NHL career win
item.description: A win against the Winnipeg Jets (15-1-0) would break a four-game losing skid for the Tampa Bay Lightning (7-6-1) and make history for one special player.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mitchell Chaffee's journey to the Tampa Bay Lightning
item.description: Making it to the NHL is a huge accomplishment for forward Mitchell Chaffee, especially as an undrafted player. Not only did he beat the odds, he’s overcome a serious injury.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: John Robinson, successful football coach at USC and with the LA Rams, has died at 89
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — John Robinson, the veteran football coach who enjoyed many years of success at the University of Southern California and with the Los Angeles Rams, has died. He was 89. The Rams confirmed Robinson's death on Monday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5
